tests.description: Single desire action stays as one item
tests.input: Go to tile (3, 4) to get +10 points

tests.description: Single calculate action stays as one item
tests.input: What is 2 + 2?

tests.description: Single time query stays as one item
tests.input: What is the current time in Tokyo?
tests.actual: ["What is the current time in Tokyo?"]

tests.description: Two actions split: desire + time
tests.input: Go to tile (3,4) to get +10pts and tell me the current time in London
tests.actual: ["Go to tile (3,4) to get +10pts","tell me the current time in London"]

tests.description: Two actions split: calculate + time
tests.input: Calculate 5*3 and tell me the time in Paris

tests.description: Two actions split: position + time
tests.input: Where am I and what time is it in Rome?

tests.description: Two actions split: desire + calculate
tests.input: Move to tile (5, 8) for +15 points and calculate 4*7

tests.description: Three actions split: desire + time + calculate
tests.input: Go to (2,3) for +5pts, tell me the time in Berlin, and compute sqrt(16)
tests.actual: ["Go to (2,3) for +5pts","tell me the time in Berlin","compute sqrt(16)"]

tests.description: Math expression in coordinates is NOT split
tests.input: Move to x=4*2 y=(1+3)*3 to get +10pts

tests.description: Delivery constraint stays as one item
tests.input: Drop packages in leftmost tile to get +5 points
tests.actual: ["Drop packages in leftmost tile to get +5 points"]

tests.description: Two delivery constraints are split
tests.input: Drop in leftmost tile for +5pts and avoid rightmost tile
tests.actual: ["Drop in leftmost tile for +5pts","avoid rightmost tile"]

tests.description: Desire + delivery constraint split
tests.input: Go to tile (7,3) for +20 points and drop in topmost tile for +10 points
tests.actual: ["Go to tile (7,3) for +20 points","drop in topmost tile for +10 points"]

tests.description: Common knowledge stays as one item
tests.input: What is the capital of France?

tests.description: Common knowledge + time split
tests.input: What is the capital of Japan? Also tell me the time in Tokyo.
tests.actual: ["What is the capital of Japan?","tell me the time in Tokyo"]

tests.description: Position query stays as one item
tests.input: What is my current position?

tests.description: Avoid tile desire stays as one
tests.input: Avoid tile (1, 1) it's dangerous

tests.description: Three separate time queries are split
tests.input: Tell me the time in London, Paris, and Tokyo
tests.actual: ["tell me the time in London","tell me the time in Paris","tell me the time in Tokyo"]

tests.description: Desire + avoid tile are split
tests.input: Go to tile (5,5) for +10pts and avoid tile (1,1)

tests.description: Modifier phrase stays attached to its action
tests.input: Go to tile (3,4) for 10 points

tests.description: Calculate with expression containing function
tests.input: What is sqrt(144)?

tests.description: Four actions are fully split
tests.input: Go to (3,4) for +5pts, calculate 10*2, tell me the time in NY, and where am I?
tests.actual: ["Go to (3,4) for +5pts","calculate 10*2","tell me the time in NY","where am I?"]

tests.description: Italian language input stays intact
tests.input: Vai alla casella (2,3) per +5 punti

tests.description: Delivery constraint + calculate split
tests.input: Avoid the bottommost tile and what is 3^4?

tests.description: Single common knowledge with no action
tests.input: What is the speed of light?

tests.description: Desire with negative points (avoid) stays as one
tests.input: Avoid tile (9,9) penalty -20pts
